name: list_dir
description: List contents of a directory inside the workspace sandbox at /home/cmart/.openclaw/workspace. Use this to see what files and subdirectories exist at a given path. Do not use this to read file contents (use read_file instead) or to find files by name pattern (use search_files instead). All paths must be relative to the workspace root.

path.description: Relative path from workspace root to the directory to list (e.g., '01_AGENTS' or '.')

name: read_file
description: Read the contents of a text file inside the workspace sandbox at /home/cmart/.openclaw/workspace. Use this to view the content of files like SKILL.md, configuration files, or other text documents. Do not use this for binary files. Do not use this to list directories (use list_dir instead) or search files by name (use search_files instead).

path.description: Relative path from workspace root to the text file to read (e.g., 'TOOLS.md' or '01_AGENTS/_REGISTRY.md')

name: write_file
description: Write or overwrite content to a text file inside the workspace sandbox at /home/cmart/.openclaw/workspace. Use this to create new files or update existing text files. Do not use this to read files (use read_file instead) or list directories (use list_dir instead).

path.description: Relative path from workspace root for the file to write, including any subdirectories (e.g., '07_OUTPUTS/test.txt')

content.description: Text content to write to the file

name: search_files
description: Search for files by name pattern inside the workspace sandbox at /home/cmart/.openclaw/workspace. Use this to locate files when you know part of the filename but not the full path. The pattern matches against filenames only, not file contents. Do not use this to read file contents (use read_file instead) or list directories (use list_dir instead).

pattern.description: Filename or partial filename to search for (e.g., 'SKILL.md' matches files named SKILL.md, 'compa' matches any filename containing 'compa')
